info.title: Ethniafrique Atlas API v2 - AFRIK
info.description:
API publique v2 basée sur la méthodologie AFRIK. Identifiants stables (FLG_*, PPL_*, codes ISO 3166-1 alpha-3) et format de réponse standardisé avec pagination. Cette API fournit un accès structuré aux données ethnographiques et linguistiques de l'Afrique.

## Response envelope shapes

Two envelope shapes coexist on `/api/v2/*` during the Module #0 rollout:

- **Module #0 endpoints** (`/sources`, `/sources/{id}`, `/doctrine`, `/confidence/{entityType}/{entityId}`, and future `/assertions`) return the new envelope: `{ data, meta: { license, attribution, pagination?, confidence?, pinned_url? }, errors: [] }`. License and attribution are always present (AR8); `errors[]` is `[]` on success and populated on non-2xx responses.
- **Legacy v2 endpoints** (`/peoples`, `/countries`, `/language-families`, `/search`) still use the older shape: `{ data, meta: { total, page, perPage, totalPages } }` for list responses and `{ data }` for item responses. They do not surface `license`, `attribution`, or an `errors` array.

Both shapes are stable for the lifetime of v2. Convergence onto the Module #0 envelope across all endpoints is tracked as a separate follow-up ticket; until then, treat the envelope shape as endpoint-scoped.

tags.name: API v2 - Language Families
tags.description: Opérations sur les familles linguistiques (API v2)

tags.name: API v2 - Module #0
tags.description: Source Transparency Fabric — sources, confidence scores, editorial doctrine

BearerAuth.description: API key issued via /api/v2/keys/issue (public tier) or the admin UI (partner/admin tiers). Pass as Authorization: Bearer <key>.

Forbidden.description: Valid key but insufficient tier permissions

Module0Forbidden.description: Valid key but insufficient tier permissions

ApiResponseMeta.description: Envelope meta block for Module #0 responses. Always carries license + attribution (AR8). Optionally includes pagination, confidence score, and pinned-version URL.

ApiErrorEntry.description: Error taxonomy entry returned inside the envelope `errors[]` array.

field.description: Field path that triggered the error (validation only)

ApiErrorEnvelope.description: Envelope returned on any non-2xx Module #0 response.

Source.description: Canonical bibliographic entry. Columns marked nullable depend on migration 014 (ETNI-22).

ConfidenceRecord.description: Pre-computed confidence record for a Module #1 fiche. Populated by the `recompute_confidence(entity_type, entity_id)` Postgres function.

PeopleRevisionItem.description: A single published revision in the people revision history list.

moderator_pseudonym.description: Privacy-preserving pseudonym derived from the moderator's internal id

pinned_url.description: Stable URL for this pinned version (AR14). Cache-Control: s-maxage=31536000, immutable.

next_cursor.description: Version to pass as ?cursor= on the next request. Null when no more pages.

PeopleRevisionListResponse.description: Cursor-paginated list of published revisions ordered by version DESC.

PeopleVersionSnapshotResponse.description: Full published snapshot at a pinned version. Data is read from the immutable revision record, never from the live entity (AR14). Response is permanently cacheable (AR18).

data.description: Full denormalised entity state as stored at publication time (snapshot_jsonb)

DoctrineEntry.description: Editorial-doctrine row (MDX source stored in DB).

FlagV2.description: Content flag raised against an AFRIK fiche. Populated by moderators and contributors.

RevisionFeedItem.description: A single revision event in the revision feed.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of content flags raised against AFRIK fiches. **Planned — not yet implemented.**
Returns a single content flag by its UUID. **Planned — not yet implemented.**
Returns a reverse-chronological feed of published revisions across all entity types. Supports cursor-based pagination. **Planned — not yet implemented.**

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque pagination cursor from the previous page's meta

get.summary: Get confidence metadata for a fiche
get.description: Returns the pre-computed confidence record for a people or language-family fiche.
Retourne les détails complets d'un pays par son code ISO 3166-1 alpha-3
Retourne la liste paginée de tous les pays d'Afrique avec leurs données AFRIK
Returns the current version of every doctrine slug. Takes no query parameters.

get.summary: Issue a public read-only API key
get.description:
Issues a shared, IP-bound, read-only public API key.
One key per IP address — returns 409 if a key already exists for this IP.
Public keys are rate-limited and can only perform read operations.
Partner and admin keys must be requested via the admin UI.
No authentication required for this endpoint.

409.description: A public key already exists for this IP address

get.description: Retourne les détails complets d'une famille linguistique par son identifiant FLG_*

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Identifiant de la famille linguistique (format FLG_*)

get.description: Retourne la liste paginée de toutes les familles linguistiques d'Afrique avec leurs données AFRIK

get.summary: Revision history for a people entity
get.description: Cursor-paginated list of published revisions ordered by version DESC. Implements AR10, AR14.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of revisions per page

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Version number of the last item from the previous page (exclusive upper bound)

get.description: Retourne les détails complets d'un peuple par son identifiant PPL_*

get.summary: Pinned-version snapshot for a people entity
get.description: Returns the full published snapshot at version n. Data is read exclusively from the immutable revision record — never from the live entity (AR14). The response carries Cache-Control: s-maxage=31536000, immutable because pinned data never changes (AR18).

Cache-Control.description: s-maxage=31536000, immutable — pinned data never changes

get.description: Retourne la liste paginée de tous les peuples d'Afrique avec leurs données AFRIK
Recherche dans les pays, peuples, langues et familles linguistiques avec filtres optionnels
Returns a paginated list of sources backing AFRIK assertions.
